cards.jyutping: m4 zi1 bin1 go3 lai4 taam3 keoi5 ne1

cards.jyutping: hou2 je5 aa3

cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 nei5 ji4 gaa1 m4 ho2 ji5 jing2 soeng2 gaa4

cards.jyutping: juk1 deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3 nei5 gai3 zuk6 laa1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E52 School Play［學校話劇］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ji4 gaa1 jiu3 heoi3 taam3 ngo5 maa4 maa4

cards.jyutping: nei5 gan1 bun2 m4 hai6 ngo5 maa4 maa4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E52 School Play［學校話劇］

cards.jyutping: gau3 meng6 aa3

cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 bin1 go3 lai4 zo2

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E52 School Play［學校話劇］
cards.jyutping: gau3 meng6 aa3
cards.english: Help...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E52 School Play［學校話劇］
cards.jyutping: si4 gaan3 ngaam1 ngaam1 hou2 hai6 lip6 jan4 aa3
cards.english: Right on time, it's Pedro the Hunter!

cards.jyutping: jau5 di1 paa3 cau2 aa3
cards.english: Pedro is a little shy

cards.jyutping: si2 m4 sai2 ngo5 pui4 nei5 hang4 ceot1 heoi3 aa3

cards.jyutping: nei5 hai6 jat1 zek3 jai5 jai5 daai6 fui1 long4

cards.jyutping: ngo5 gau3 zo2 nei5 aa3 maa4 maa4

cards.jyutping: do1 ze6 nei5

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E52 School Play［學校話劇］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E52 School Play［學校話劇］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zan1 hai6 zou6 dak1 hou2 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Pedro, you did a really good job.

cards.jyutping: caa1 m4 do1 jau5 ngo5 jin2 dak1 gam3 hou2 aa3

defs: measure word to show the frequency of an action
to arrive at (a decision, conclusion etc)
to arrive at (a decision, conclusion etc)
measure word to show the frequency of an action
used in courteous phrases expressing causing trouble
(bound form) having; with; -ful; -ed; -al (as in 有意[you3 yi4] intentional)
each one individually; each and every
for the time being; for now
(prefix) my late (in referring to deceased relatives older than oneself)
(of transportation schedules of bus, flights etc.) 1. number of runs (slang) to call (for a group of gang)
classifier for groups of people and scheduled transport vehicles
final particle expressing consent and denial, liveliness and irritation
used as a final particle to add emphasis
used as a final particle to add emphasis
used as a final particle to add emphasis
as far as sth is concerned
behaviour; 2. Conduct; (of suffix) used after an adverb or after an adjective to form an adverb.
used after an adjective to form an adverb
used after an adverb for emphasis
